text: Kickoff call with Rajesh Bharti. They are evaluating our ERP platform for their textile export business and seem very interested.
Rajesh shared their requirements doc. They need inventory tracking
Follow-up demo went well. Rajesh mentioned they want to migrate from their existing Tally setup within 90 days.
Sent the proposal. Promised to share pricing details by June 20.
Rajesh called — they have a board meeting next week and need the cost breakdown in a specific format. Promised to revise and resend by June 25.
Sent revised proposal. Rajesh says they'll discuss with their partners and get back by early July.
Onboarding call with their logistics head. They handle cold storage transport and promise reliable pan-India delivery.
First trial shipment scheduled. They promised to deliver a sample batch to our warehouse by June 10.
Shipment arrived 2 days late. Quality was acceptable but the delay is concerning for perishable goods.
Discussed SLA terms. They committed to a 48-hour delivery window with temperature tracking for the main contract.
Sent the draft SLA. Waiting for their legal team to review and revert.
Brijesh from Elite Electronics reached out. They supply industrial-grade components and want to be added to our vendor list.
Audited their manufacturing facility in Bhiwadi. Quality control processes look solid. They promised to share compliance certificates by June 22.
Received the compliance certificates. All ISO and BIS certifications are in order. Approved for pilot order.
Placed first PO-103 for 500 units of MCB components. They promised delivery by July 15.
Intro call with Metro Health's CEO. They want to partner for healthcare supply chain integration.
Signed the partnership MOU. They promised to share API documentation by June 15 for integration testing.
Received the API docs. Their system supports real-time inventory sync. Integration sprint planned for July.
Kickoff meeting with their tech team. They promised to have a sandbox environment ready by July 5.
Cold email from their procurement team. They're looking for a vendor management solution and found our platform.
Discovery call. They manage 200+ suppliers across 3 countries and need multi-currency support.
Product demo to their VP of Operations. Positive response — they especially liked the Entropy-based alert system.
They sent a list of integration requirements. Promised to evaluate and respond with a proposal timeline by July 5.
